scope: Scope N2-B — generic RepoLogMiner primitives and candidate registry

components.name: CandidateRegistry
components.responsibility: Load and validate a versioned, explicitly-provided candidate registry file: schema conformance plus the selection_status state-machine transition contract.

components.name: EligibilityPolicy
components.responsibility: Apply hard rejection rules to every candidate before any scoring occurs. Produces a per-rule pass/fail report with evidence and an exact rejection reason.

components.name: CandidateScorer
components.responsibility: Deterministically score eligible candidates on license/source/offline-feasibility/dependency-lock/detector-confidence/coverage/size/security/cost/reproducibility features, with a SHA256-based deterministic tie-break.
non_goals: post-hoc manual reweighting after viewing benchmark output

components.name: QuotaAwareSelectionPlanner
components.responsibility: Given a deterministic ranking and quota targets, produce a PROVISIONAL proposed selection, unfilled-quota deficits, eligible alternatives, and a deterministic selection trace.
non_goals: fixing the final N2 case set

components.name: BuildDetector
components.responsibility: Dispatch every registered ToolAdapter's detect() over a source tree (filenames/manifests/lockfiles only) and report per-ecosystem detection results; refuses automatic ecosystem selection when more than one ecosystem is plausible.

components.name: ToolAdapterRegistry
components.responsibility: One inspection/planning module per ecosystem, sharing a common duck-typed interface. Never executes a package manager, build tool, wrapper script, or repository-provided script.
non_goals: executing any of the five ecosystems' real toolchains in this scope

components.name: AcquisitionPlanner
components.responsibility: Produce a PLAN (never a new execution) separating trusted acquisition, trusted dependency realization, untrusted execution, and artifact collection, with explicit allowed/forbidden operations per stage.

components.name: SandboxExecutionPlanner
components.responsibility: Plan confinement using the accepted Sandboy S0 identity only; enforces a proven filesystem capability envelope and flags any adapter requirement outside it as a capability_gap instead of silently widening the sandbox.

components.name: ToolchainIdentityContract
components.responsibility: Keep requested/resolved/executed toolchain identity distinct and classify their relationship (exact-match/compatible-resolution/unexpected-resolution/identity-missing); identity-missing is always a hard failure.

components.name: SanitizerContract
components.responsibility: Validate sanitizer profiles: deterministic, minimal, test-covered transformations only; structurally forbids dedup/reorder/truncate/token-reduction/diagnostic-removal transformations.

components.name: ReceiptContract
components.responsibility: Validate the versioned generic receipt shape and enforce non-empty mandatory identity fields.

components.name: ReproducibilityContract
components.responsibility: Compare two receipts field-by-field; for a configurable set of identity fields, null==null or ""=="" never counts as agreement.

components.name: N2ACompatibilityGate
components.responsibility: Build a generic plan from the frozen N2-A source-manifest.json (read-only) and diff it against N2-A's actual accepted behavior; requires zero unexplained incompatibilities.
